description: Lightning-paywall sidecar: wraps any stdio MCP server, requires paid invoices before tool calls.
name: io.github.llmops-pro/paywall-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Command to spawn the upstream MCP server (e.g. npx)
environmentVariables.name: PAYWALL_UPSTREAM_COMMAND

environmentVariables.description: JSON array of args for the upstream command
environmentVariables.name: PAYWALL_UPSTREAM_ARGS

environmentVariables.description: NWC connection string of the receiving wallet (receive-only recommended)
environmentVariables.name: NWC_CONNECTION_STRING

environmentVariables.description: Default price in sats for tools not in PAYWALL_PRICE_MAP
environmentVariables.name: PAYWALL_DEFAULT_PRICE_SATS

environmentVariables.description: JSON map of tool name to price in sats
environmentVariables.name: PAYWALL_PRICE_MAP
